summary: Made a minimal exit-continuity adjustment so Halima's delay in dismantling her roof reads as temporary, aligning more cleanly with the next chapter's opening movement. Entry continuity from Chapter 15 already held without revision, and no style-bible example lines were present to replace.
edits: Softened the final roof-delay phrasing so the chapter ends on postponement rather than a more final-sounding hold.
Left the opening intact because its handoff from Chapter 15 and structural shape remained distinct from the visible neighboring opening.
